name: Cube Builder
author: Poki
description: Cube Builder is a simulation game where you gather resources to escape a desert island! Chop trees, mine stone, and craft steps to build awesome houses while defending yourself from invading zombie monsters. Sell your resources for cash, upgrade your skills, and get stronger and faster with every step. Can you survive, build, and find your way off the island? How to play Cube Builder? Use WASD, arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Cube Builder? Cube Builder is created by Platonov Developer. Play their other games on Poki: Digger Escape and Cube Miner ! How can I play Cube Builder for free? You can play Cube Builder for free on Poki. Can I play Cube Builder on mobile devices and desktop? Cube Builder can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
